name: Automaton Lifecycle
description: Brings Automaton-inspired survival pressure, adaptive heartbeat, structured memory journaling, and soul reflection into OpenClaw.

dailyBudgetUsd.description: Maximum daily API spend in USD. When exceeded, agent downgrades to a cheaper model. Default: 5.0

lowComputeThresholdPct.description: Percentage of daily budget consumed before entering low_compute tier (0-100). Default: 80

criticalThresholdPct.description: Percentage of daily budget consumed before entering critical tier (0-100). Default: 95

lowComputeModel.description: Model to switch to in low_compute tier, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o-mini'. Falls back to agent default if not set.

idleHeartbeatMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to heartbeat interval after N consecutive idle ticks. Default: 2

idleTicksBeforeSlowdown.description: Number of consecutive HEARTBEAT_OK ticks before heartbeat slowdown kicks in. Default: 3

soulReflectionModel.description: Cheap model used for SOUL.md reflection during idle heartbeats. Falls back to lowComputeModel or agent default.

enableMemoryJournal.description: Enable the SQLite-backed episodic memory journal. Default: true

enableSoulReflection.description: Enable periodic SOUL.md self-reflection during idle heartbeats. Default: true

agentHubUrl.description: Agent Hub API 的基础连接地址 (如 http://127.0.0.1:8000)。默认从环境变量读取，若填写此项将覆盖系统配置。

agentToken.description: Agent Token（Hub 注册后下发，可选）。若填写将覆盖 AGENT_HUB_TOKEN 环境变量。

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite DB for spend tracking and memory journal. Default: ~/.openclaw/automaton-lifecycle.db

botToken.description: Telegram Bot Token (or use TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var)

chatId.description: Telegram Chat ID (or use TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var)

parseMode.description: Message parse mode. Default: (unset -> plain text)

enabled.description: Enable silent mode during night hours. Default: false

timezone.description: Timezone for silent mode (e.g., Asia/Shanghai). Default: UTC

budgetAlert.description: Notify when budget reaches 80%. Default: true

heartbeatAnomaly.description: Notify on heartbeat deep sleep activation. Default: true

soulUpdate.description: Notify when SOUL.md is updated. Default: false

agentEnd.description: Notify on agent task completion. Default: false

progressMonitor.description: Progress monitor settings (agent_end watcher; optional AI analysis)

useAi.description: Enable AI analysis mode. Default: false

aiUrl.description: AI API URL (required when useAi=true). Env: PROGRESS_MONITOR_AI_URL

aiKey.description: AI API Key (required when useAi=true). Env: PROGRESS_MONITOR_AI_KEY

notifyOnAiError.description: Notify immediately when AI call fails. Default: false

monitorSlowReply.description: Enable slow reply alert. Default: true
